title: Voltz Gaming
description: Modpack for a existing server of friends
body:
Voltz Gaming is a 1.20.1 server modpack with a lot of tech and magic added to it. Visit the classic Aether, Visit the moon, or visit the Deep Dark.  With 140+ mods there are many to keep players active and busy and also give other options if they get bored. If you wish to PVP you can launch nuclear weapons at one another (With permission from server owner).

Now with FUMOS! (For you weebs). 

SERVER IS NO LONGER UP
